briefdescription.para: Media Codec Type is not valid.
Media Codec Type is not supported.
Sampling Frequency is not valid or multiple values have been selected.
Channel Mode is not valid or multiple values have been selected.
None or multiple values have been selected for Number of Subbands.
Number of Subbands is not supported.
None or multiple values have been selected for Allocation Method.
Minimum Bitpool Value is not valid.
Minimum Bitpool Value is not supported.
Maximum Bitpool Value is not valid.
Maximum Bitpool Value is not supported.
None or multiple values have been selected for Layer.
None or multiple values have been selected for Bit Rate.
Either 1) Object type is not valid or 2) None or multiple values have been selected for Object Type.
Either 1) Channels is not valid or 2) None or multiple values have been selected for Channels.
Maximum SUL is not acceptable for the Decoder in the SNK.
None or multiple values have been selected for Block Length.
The requested CP Type is not supported.
The format of Content Protection Service Capability/Content Protection Scheme Dependent Data is not correct.

detaileddescription.para: Used if a more specific error code does not exist for the codec in use

briefdescription.para: The codec parameter is not supported.

detaileddescription.para: Used if a more specific error code does not exist for the codec in use

briefdescription.para: Combination of Object Type and DRC is invalid.
Helper enum to be used as return value of bt_a2dp_discover_ep_cb.

detaileddescription.para: The value informs the caller to perform further pending actions or stop them.

briefdescription.para: Called when a stream endpoint is discovered.

detaileddescription.para: A function of this type is given by the user to the bt_a2dp_discover_param object. It'll be called on each valid stream endpoint discovery completion. When no more endpoint then NULL is passed to the user. Otherwise user can get valid endpoint information from parameter info, user can set parameter ep to get the endpoint after the callback is return. The returned function value allows the user to control retrieving follow-up endpoints if any. If the user doesn't want to read more endpoints since current found endpoints fulfill its requirements then should return BT_A2DP_DISCOVER_EP_STOP. Otherwise returned value means more subcall iterations are allowable.

parameterdescription.para: a2dp connection object identifying a2dp connection to queried remote.
Object pointing to the information of the callbacked endpoint.
If the user want to use this found endpoint, user can set value to it to get the endpoint that can be used further in other A2DP APIs. It is NULL if info is NULL (no more endpoint is found).

simplesect.para: BT_A2DP_DISCOVER_EP_STOP in case of no more need to continue discovery for next endpoint. By returning BT_A2DP_DISCOVER_EP_STOP user allows this discovery continuation.

detaileddescription.para: This function is to be called after the conn parameter is obtained by performing a GAP procedure. The API is to be used to establish A2DP connection between devices. This function only establish AVDTP L2CAP Signaling connection. After connection success, the callback that is registered by bt_a2dp_register_connect_callback is called.

simplesect.para: pointer to struct bt_a2dp in case of success or NULL in case of error.

detaileddescription.para: This function close AVDTP L2CAP Signaling connection. It closes the AVDTP L2CAP Media connection too if it is established.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success and error code in case of error.

parameterdescription.para: Media type that the Endpoint is, bt_avdtp_media_type.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success and error code in case of error.

detaileddescription.para: The cb is called when bt_a2dp_connect is called or it is operated by remote device.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success and error code in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Obtain the ACL connection corresponding to A2DP.

simplesect.para: Connection object associated with the A2DP context. The caller gets a new reference to the connection object which must be released with bt_conn_unref() once done using the object.
0 in case of success and error code in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Register Audio callbacks for a stream.

detaileddescription.para: Register Audio callbacks for a stream.

memberdef.argsstring: (struct bt_a2dp *a2dp, struct bt_a2dp_stream *stream, struct bt_a2dp_ep *local_ep, struct bt_a2dp_ep *remote_ep, struct bt_a2dp_codec_cfg *config)
memberdef.name: bt_a2dp_stream_config

detaileddescription.para: bt_a2dp_discover can be used to find remote's endpoints. This function to configure the selected endpoint that is found by bt_a2dp_discover. This function sends AVDTP_SET_CONFIGURATION.

parameterdescription.para: The configured endpoint that is registered.
The config to configure the endpoint.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success and error code in case of error.

detaileddescription.para: This function sends the AVDTP_GET_CONFIGURATION command.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success and error code in case of error.

detaileddescription.para: This function sends the AVDTP_OPEN command and create the l2cap channel.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success and error code in case of error.

detaileddescription.para: This function sends the AVDTP_CLOSE command and release the l2cap channel. After release, the stream becomes invalid.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success and error code in case of error.

detaileddescription.para: This function sends the AVDTP_START command.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success and error code in case of error.

detaileddescription.para: This function sends the AVDTP_SUSPEND command.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success and error code in case of error.

detaileddescription.para: This function sends the AVDTP_RECONFIGURE command.

parameterdescription.para: The config to configure the stream.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success and error code in case of error.

detaileddescription.para: This function sends the AVDTP_ABORT command. After abort, the stream becomes invalid.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success and error code in case of error.

memberdef.argsstring: (struct bt_a2dp_stream *stream, struct net_buf *buf, uint16_t seq_num, uint32_t ts)
memberdef.name: bt_a2dp_stream_send

detaileddescription.para: Only A2DP source side can call this function.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success and error code in case of error.

detaileddescription.para: This function allocates a buffer from the specified pool, reserves sufficient headroom for protocol headers required by L2CAP over Bluetooth, fills the AVDTP header.

parameterdescription.para: The buffer pool to allocate from.
Non-negative waiting period to obtain a buffer or one of the special values K_NO_WAIT and K_FOREVER.

detaileddescription.para: Only A2DP sink side can call this function.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success and error code in case of error.

briefdescription.para: The max IE (Codec Info Element) length.

memberdef.name: BT_A2DP_SBC_SINK_EP
memberdef.initializer: static struct bt_a2dp_codec_ie bt_a2dp_ep_cap_ie##_name = { \ .len = BT_A2DP_SBC_IE_LENGTH, \ .codec_ie = {_freq | _ch_mode, _blk_len | _subband | _alloc_mthd, _min_bitpool, \ _max_bitpool}}; \ static struct bt_a2dp_ep _name = \ BT_A2DP_SINK_EP_INIT(BT_A2DP_SBC, (&bt_a2dp_ep_cap_ie##_name), _delay_report)

briefdescription.para: define the SBC sink endpoint that can be used as bt_a2dp_register_ep's parameter.

detaileddescription.para: SBC is mandatory as a2dp specification, BT_A2DP_SBC_SINK_EP_DEFAULT is more convenient for user to register SBC endpoint.

parameterdescription.para: sbc codec frequency. for example: A2DP_SBC_SAMP_FREQ_44100 | A2DP_SBC_SAMP_FREQ_48000
sbc codec channel mode. for example: A2DP_SBC_CH_MODE_MONO | A2DP_SBC_CH_MODE_STEREO
sbc codec block length. for example: A2DP_SBC_BLK_LEN_16
sbc codec subband. for example: A2DP_SBC_SUBBAND_8
sbc codec allocate method. for example: A2DP_SBC_ALLOC_MTHD_LOUDNESS
sbc codec min bit pool. for example: 18
sbc codec max bit pool. for example: 35

memberdef.name: BT_A2DP_SBC_SOURCE_EP
memberdef.initializer: static struct bt_a2dp_codec_ie bt_a2dp_ep_cap_ie##_name = { \ .len = BT_A2DP_SBC_IE_LENGTH, \ .codec_ie = {_freq | _ch_mode, _blk_len | _subband | _alloc_mthd, _min_bitpool, \ _max_bitpool}}; \ static struct bt_a2dp_ep _name = \ BT_A2DP_SOURCE_EP_INIT(BT_A2DP_SBC, &bt_a2dp_ep_cap_ie##_name, _delay_report)

briefdescription.para: define the SBC source endpoint that can be used as bt_a2dp_register_ep's parameter.

detaileddescription.para: SBC is mandatory as a2dp specification, BT_A2DP_SBC_SOURCE_EP_DEFAULT is more convenient for user to register SBC endpoint.

parameterdescription.para: sbc codec frequency. for example: A2DP_SBC_SAMP_FREQ_44100 | A2DP_SBC_SAMP_FREQ_48000
sbc codec channel mode. for example: A2DP_SBC_CH_MODE_MONO | A2DP_SBC_CH_MODE_STEREO
sbc codec block length. for example: A2DP_SBC_BLK_LEN_16
sbc codec subband. for example: A2DP_SBC_SUBBAND_8
sbc codec allocate method. for example: A2DP_SBC_ALLOC_MTHD_LOUDNESS
sbc codec min bit pool. for example: 18
sbc codec max bit pool. for example: 35

memberdef.name: BT_A2DP_SBC_SINK_EP_DEFAULT
memberdef.initializer: static struct bt_a2dp_codec_ie bt_a2dp_ep_cap_ie##_name = { \ .len = BT_A2DP_SBC_IE_LENGTH, \ .codec_ie = {A2DP_SBC_SAMP_FREQ_44100 | A2DP_SBC_SAMP_FREQ_48000 | \ A2DP_SBC_CH_MODE_MONO | A2DP_SBC_CH_MODE_STEREO | \ A2DP_SBC_CH_MODE_JOINT, \ A2DP_SBC_BLK_LEN_16 | A2DP_SBC_SUBBAND_8 | \ A2DP_SBC_ALLOC_MTHD_LOUDNESS, \ 18U, 35U}}; \ static struct bt_a2dp_ep _name = \ BT_A2DP_SINK_EP_INIT(BT_A2DP_SBC, &bt_a2dp_ep_cap_ie##_name, true)

briefdescription.para: define the default SBC sink endpoint that can be used as bt_a2dp_register_ep's parameter.

detaileddescription.para: SBC is mandatory as a2dp specification, BT_A2DP_SBC_SINK_EP_DEFAULT is more convenient for user to register SBC endpoint.

memberdef.name: BT_A2DP_SBC_SOURCE_EP_DEFAULT
memberdef.initializer: static struct bt_a2dp_codec_ie bt_a2dp_ep_cap_ie##_name = { \ .len = BT_A2DP_SBC_IE_LENGTH, \ .codec_ie = {A2DP_SBC_SAMP_FREQ_44100 | A2DP_SBC_SAMP_FREQ_48000 | \ A2DP_SBC_CH_MODE_MONO | A2DP_SBC_CH_MODE_STEREO | \ A2DP_SBC_CH_MODE_JOINT, \ A2DP_SBC_BLK_LEN_16 | A2DP_SBC_SUBBAND_8 | \ A2DP_SBC_ALLOC_MTHD_LOUDNESS, \ 18U, 35U}, \ }; \ static struct bt_a2dp_ep _name = \ BT_A2DP_SOURCE_EP_INIT(BT_A2DP_SBC, &bt_a2dp_ep_cap_ie##_name, false)

briefdescription.para: define the default SBC source endpoint that can be used as bt_a2dp_register_ep's parameter.

detaileddescription.para: SBC is mandatory as a2dp specification, BT_A2DP_SBC_SOURCE_EP_DEFAULT is more convenient for user to register SBC endpoint.

memberdef.name: BT_A2DP_SBC_EP_CFG
memberdef.initializer: static struct bt_a2dp_codec_ie bt_a2dp_codec_ie##_name = { \ .len = BT_A2DP_SBC_IE_LENGTH, \ .codec_ie = {_freq_cfg | _ch_mode_cfg, \ _blk_len_cfg | _subband_cfg | _alloc_mthd_cfg, _min_bitpool_cfg, \ _max_bitpool_cfg}, \ }; \ struct bt_a2dp_codec_cfg _name = { \ .codec_config = &bt_a2dp_codec_ie##_name, \ }

parameterdescription.para: sbc codec frequency. for example: A2DP_SBC_SAMP_FREQ_44100
sbc codec channel mode. for example: A2DP_SBC_CH_MODE_JOINT
sbc codec block length. for example: A2DP_SBC_BLK_LEN_16
sbc codec subband. for example: A2DP_SBC_SUBBAND_8
sbc codec allocate method. for example: A2DP_SBC_ALLOC_MTHD_LOUDNESS
sbc codec min bit pool. for example: 18
sbc codec max bit pool. for example: 35

memberdef.name: BT_A2DP_SBC_EP_CFG_DEFAULT
memberdef.initializer: static struct bt_a2dp_codec_ie bt_a2dp_codec_ie##_name = { \ .len = BT_A2DP_SBC_IE_LENGTH, \ .codec_ie = {_freq_cfg | A2DP_SBC_CH_MODE_JOINT, \ A2DP_SBC_BLK_LEN_16 | A2DP_SBC_SUBBAND_8 | \ A2DP_SBC_ALLOC_MTHD_LOUDNESS, \ 18U, 35U}, \ }; \ struct bt_a2dp_codec_cfg _name = { \ .codec_config = &bt_a2dp_codec_ie##_name, \ }

parameterdescription.para: the frequency to configure the remote same codec type endpoint.
